title: Differential graded categories in holomorphic symplectic geometry
summary: Let $(\mathrm{X},σ)$ be a holomorphic symplectic manifold. We study the differential graded category of canonical Lagrangian $\mathrm{D}$-branes $\mathcal{D}_\mathrm{Lag}(\mathrm{X},σ)$ along with its deformation quantisation, spanned by quantised orientations, $\mathcal{DQ}(\mathrm{X},σ)$, and the virtual de Rham category $\mathcal{DR}^{\mathrm{vir}}(\mathrm{X},σ)$. We prove the formality of these dg categories when localised at a countable collection of orientable compact Kähler Lagrangian submanifolds with pairwise clean intersections. Along the way, we define Kaledin classes of minimal $\mathrm{A}_\infty$-categories and show that they are the obstructions to formality. In addition, we obtain a formality criterion for flat weakly proper Calabi-Yau dg categories.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了全纯辛流形上的规范拉格朗日D膜微分分次范畴及其形变量子化，证明了在可数定向紧致Kähler拉格朗日子流形具有成对干净交集的局部化条件下这些dg范畴的形式性。
AI.motivation: 研究全纯辛流形上规范拉格朗日D膜范畴及其形变量子化的代数结构，探索这些微分分次范畴的形式性条件，为辛几何与代数几何的交叉领域提供理论工具。
AI.method: 定义了Kaledin类作为最小A∞-范畴的形式性障碍，建立了平坦弱适当Calabi-Yau dg范畴的形式性判据，通过局部化技术在可数定向紧致Kähler拉格朗日子流形具有成对干净交集的条件下证明形式性。
AI.result: 证明了规范拉格朗日D膜范畴、形变量子化范畴和虚拟de Rham范畴在特定局部化条件下的形式性，建立了Kaledin类作为A∞-范畴形式性障碍的数学理论。
AI.conclusion: 全纯辛流形上的规范拉格朗日D膜范畴及其相关范畴在适当条件下具有形式性，Kaledin类提供了判断A∞-范畴形式性的有效工具，为辛几何中的量子化问题提供了新的代数框架。

title: Artin-Schreier quandles of involutions in absolute Galois groups
comment: 22 pages, 1 figure, to appear in Abh. Math. Sem. Univ. Hamburg
summary: We introduce a new invariant of fields that refines their real spectrum and is related to their absolute Galois group: the Artin-Schreier quandle. For formally real number fields, it is freely generated in its variety by a Cantor space of indeterminates. For Laurent series fields, we compute it in terms of the Artin-Schreier quandle of the coefficient field. This result and other examples show that, in general, there are relations.

AI.tldr: 论文引入了一个新的域不变量——Artin-Schreier quandle，它细化了实谱并与绝对伽罗瓦群相关，研究了在形式实数域和洛朗级数域中的性质。
AI.motivation: 需要一个新的域不变量来细化实谱，并与域的绝对伽罗瓦群建立联系，以更好地理解域的结构性质。
AI.method: 引入Artin-Schreier quandle作为新的域不变量，研究其在形式实数域和洛朗级数域中的具体结构和性质。
AI.result: 对于形式实数域，Artin-Schreier quandle在其变种中由一个康托尔空间的不定元自由生成；对于洛朗级数域，可以用系数域的Artin-Schreier quandle来计算。
AI.conclusion: Artin-Schreier quandle是一个有效的域不变量，能够细化实谱并与伽罗瓦群相关，但在一般情况下存在关系约束。

title: An Elliott intertwining approach to classifying actions of C$^*$-tensor categories
summary: We introduce a categorical approach to classifying actions of C$^*$-tensor categories $\mathcal{C}$ on C$^*$-algebras up to cocycle conjugacy. We show that, in this category, inductive limits exist and there is a natural notion of approximate unitary equivalence. Then, we generalise classical Elliott intertwining results to the $\mathcal{C}$-equivariant case, in the same fashion as done by Szabó for the group equivariant case in [39].

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个分类C*-张量范畴在C*-代数上作用的范畴方法，推广了经典Elliott交织定理到范畴等变情形
AI.motivation: 研究C*-张量范畴在C*-代数上的作用分类问题，建立范畴等变版本的分类理论，推广群等变情形的研究成果
AI.method: 采用范畴论方法，定义C*-张量范畴作用的范畴结构，证明归纳极限存在性，建立近似酉等价概念，推广Elliott交织定理到范畴等变情形
AI.result: 成功建立了C*-张量范畴作用分类的范畴框架，证明了归纳极限存在，定义了近似酉等价，并得到了范畴等变版本的Elliott交织定理
AI.conclusion: 该工作为C*-张量范畴作用分类提供了系统的范畴论框架，将经典算子代数分类理论推广到更一般的等变情形

title: Fermionic extensions of $W$-algebras via 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ gauge theories with a boundary
summary: We study properties of vertex (operator) algebras associated with 3d H-twisted $\mathcal{N}=4$ supersymmetric gauge theories with a boundary. The vertex operator algebras (VOAs) are defined by BRST cohomologies of currents with symplectic bosons, complex fermions, and bc-ghosts. We point out that VOAs for 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ abelian gauge theories are fermionic extensions of VOAs associated with toric hyper-Kähler varieties. From this relation, it follows that the VOA associated with the 3d mirror of $N$-flavor $U(1)$ SQED is a fermionic extension of a $W$-algebra $W^{-N+1}(\mathfrak{sl}_N, f_{\text{sub}})$. For $N=3$, we explicitly compute the OPE of elements in the BRST cohomology and find a new algebra that is a fermionic extension of a Bershadsky-Polyakov algebra $W^{-2}(\mathfrak{sl}_3, f_{\text{sub}})$. We also suggest an expression for the vacuum character of the fermionic extension of $W^{-N+1}(\mathfrak{sl}_N, f_{\text{sub}})$ predicted by 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ mirror symmetry.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究3d H-扭曲N=4超对称规范理论边界关联的顶点算子代数性质，发现阿贝尔规范理论的VOAs是环面超凯勒簇VOAs的费米子扩展，并具体计算了N=3时的OPE，发现新的费米子扩展Bershadsky-Polyakov代数。
AI.motivation: 研究3d N=4超对称规范理论边界关联的顶点算子代数性质，探索阿贝尔规范理论VOAs与环面超凯勒簇VOAs的关系，并通过3d镜像对称预测真空特征标表达式。
AI.method: 使用BRST上同调方法定义顶点算子代数，结合流、辛玻色子、复费米子和bc-鬼场构建VOAs。通过具体计算N=3情况下的算子乘积展开(OPE)，并与已知的W-代数结构进行比较。
AI.result: 发现3d N=4阿贝尔规范理论的VOAs是环面超凯勒簇VOAs的费米子扩展；具体得出3d镜像对称下N-味U(1) SQED对应的VOA是W^{-N+1}(sl_N, f_sub)的费米子扩展；N=3时计算得到新的费米子扩展Bershadsky-Polyakov代数W^{-2}(sl_3, f_sub)。
AI.conclusion: 3d N=4阿贝尔规范理论边界关联的顶点算子代数具有丰富的代数结构，与环面超凯勒簇VOAs存在密切关系，通过3d镜像对称可以预测这些费米子扩展W-代数的真空特征标表达式，为理解规范理论与代数结构的关系提供了新视角。
